description: ORBIT-ML multi-horizon cross-sectional residual-drift ranker, integrated as the shadow EVOLVE specialist idiosyncraticPersistence. Reuses the merged ORBIT engines; adds a date-grouped rank objective + EVOLVE framing + marginal-ensemble measurement.
codeCommit: e491bed base (main, ORBIT merged); ORBIT-ML changes on feat/orbit-ml-specialist

model.objective: future net residual-return rank within decision-date groups
model.preprocessing: winsor(2/98) + standardise, fit in-fold (reused from orbit-model)

boostedChallenger.type: LightGBM LambdaRank / CatBoost via JSON-tree adapter
boostedChallenger.reason: no Python/LightGBM in environment; adapter + evaluator implemented and unit-tested; NO boosted result fabricated

foldDefinitions.purge: training dropped unless labelEndDate + embargo < block start

calibration.reused: orbit-calibration (evolve.fitCalibrator isotonic + Platt/beta select by held-out Brier)

run_24names_5y.verdict: No durable OOS rank quality; NEGATIVE incremental ensemble contribution → fails the incremental-value promotion gate.

limitations: Survivorship-biased current-survivor universe; delisted names absent.
Bounded universe (24 names); full universe not run.
